subject: Picked particles have different box size?
body:
Hi Dimitry,


I have a problem here. I have picked particles in Warp, imported 
to Cryosparc, but when I'm trying to downsample or do 2D classes directly 
the job fails giving the error below. To my best understanding the issue is 
that not all the particles have the same box size...

I have done the obvious things like restarting warp and re-picking using 
the same settings and parameters, but nothing have worked.

As the downsampling job seems to fail during the last batch (i.e 726) I 
have deleted a number of particles from the end of the metafile, but 
nevertheless it still failed during the last batch, in this case batch nr. 
725. 

Any thoughts how can I make it work? 

Many thanks!

Csaba Kibedi 


Error message from downsampling job:

[CPU: 2.71 GB] Traceback (most recent call last): File 
"cryosparc_worker/cryosparc_compute/run.py", line 84, in 
cryosparc_compute.run.main File 
"/local_slow/cryosparc/cryosparc2_worker/cryosparc_compute/jobs/extract/run.py", 
line 740, in run_downsample_particles pool.map(work, enumerate(batches)) 
File 
"/local_slow/cryosparc/cryosparc2_worker/deps/anaconda/envs/cryosparc_worker_env/lib/python3.7/multiprocessing/pool.py", 
line 268, in map return self._map_async(func, iterable, mapstar, 
chunksize).get() File 
"/local_slow/cryosparc/cryosparc2_worker/deps/anaconda/envs/cryosparc_worker_env/lib/python3.7/multiprocessing/pool.py", 
line 657, in get raise self._value File 
"/local_slow/cryosparc/cryosparc2_worker/deps/anaconda/envs/cryosparc_worker_env/lib/python3.7/multiprocessing/pool.py", 
line 121, in worker result = (True, func(*args, **kwds)) File 
"/local_slow/cryosparc/cryosparc2_worker/deps/anaconda/envs/cryosparc_worker_env/lib/python3.7/multiprocessing/pool.py", 
line 44, in mapstar return list(map(*args)) File 
"/local_slow/cryosparc/cryosparc2_worker/cryosparc_compute/jobs/extract/run.py", 
line 699, in work data_in[idx] = particle.rawdata.view() # reads data 
ValueError: could not broadcast input array from shape (700,700) into shape 
(736,736) 


Error message from the 2D classification job:

  [CPU: 863.4 MB] Traceback (most recent call last): File 
"cryosparc_worker/cryosparc_compute/run.py", line 84, in 
cryosparc_compute.run.main File 
"cryosparc_worker/cryosparc_compute/jobs/class2D/run.py", line 45, in 
cryosparc_compute.jobs.class2D.run.run_class_2D File 
"/local_slow/cryosparc/cryosparc2_worker/cryosparc_compute/particles.py", 
line 37, in init assert n.all(self.data['blob/shape'][:,0] == 
self.N_input), "All particles must have the same box size." AssertionError: 
All particles must have the same box size.
